title: DeadWeight
description: Server side mod that tells players death coordinates
body:
![Bold text that says "DeadWeight"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac209592b0fd883a95fb584043c8b36ba068e5ba.png)
## Features
A mod that adds coordinates to death messages server side

![An example showing a player dying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83eeb2560f45293abe716eb8a599bec11bb2adf7_0.webp)

If you're getting duplicate death messages you can try 
```
/gamerule show_death_messages false
```


## Details
The mod is broadly compatible with versions from 1.20.5 upwards however anything below 1.21.5 is not recommended.
Requires fabric-api
